description: Style NoteFresh from the brand's design studio, remanika pieces have been flying off myntra's shelves into fashionistas' wardrobes. This prettily styled versatile top is designed from luxe cotton (a summer luxury!) that you can style with capris or colour block denims. For the summer, we suggest a beaded pair of thongs for your feet!Product DetailsNavy blue sleeveless top with a boat neck, lace trims, embroidery on the shoulders, square cut-outs at the back, elastication at the back yoke, dobby weave, fabric belt, ruffles at the hem with the front longer than the backMaterial and Care CottonGentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit  Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
